title: thelypteris palustris f. linearis
intro: Thelypteris palustris f. linearis, also known as the linear-leaved marsh fern, is a subspecies of the common polypody fern (Thelypteris palustris), a type of flowering plant in the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris palustris f. linearis include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, often used to treat various health conditions, although its effectiveness and safety should be further studied and confirmed.
